title: NeoForgified Create x Cobblemon
description: This pack is born of Create, Cobblemon and warfare wishing to live together.
body:
This pack is born of Create, Cobblemon and warfare wishing to live together.

 

When you want some Cobblemon, but also make war to your peers through Create warfare capabilities.

At the moment, most of Create addons are unusable because the mod updated to its 6th version and they need time to step up to it.

[ Temporary project picture ]
